name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
CEL.INE🌞 Latest mini Tabou Clutch onStrap lock-strap handbag TRIOMPHE Canvas logo shoulder bag White leather/calfskin
Fabric lining, eye-catching gold hardware lock
The bag features one long and one short leather shoulder strap, non-adjustable, can be carried by hand or over the shoulder®️
Size: 18 X 8 X 5cm
Model: 2298#
